visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a bright, graphic-heavy title card featuring the Costco logo, a cartoon character expressing shock, and large Traditional Chinese characters announcing a weekly special report. The background is a blurred warehouse ceiling. (2) A series of rapid-fire cuts show various refrigerated and frozen food products stacked on shelves, starting with Ibérico pork belly. Text overlays detailing original and discounted prices dominate the center of the frame. (3) The sequence continues through household and personal care items like toilet paper and sanitary napkins, each shown in its bulk packaging within the warehouse setting. (4) The visuals shift to a long montage of snacks, crackers, and biscuits, including butterfly cookies, PopCorners, and seaweed snacks, all presented in their commercial packaging on warehouse pallets. (5) A final section features beverages, pantry staples like noodles and oats, and various alcoholic drinks including whiskey and wine bottles, following the same price-tag overlay format until the end of the video.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No real people are visible in the video, only product packaging and graphic elements.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of various sections of a Costco warehouse store, showing large pallets, high industrial shelving, refrigerators, and stacks of bulk-packaged consumer goods.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male narrator introducing the Costco weekly specials at a rapid-fire pace, accompanied by an upbeat, electronic pop backing track with a steady 128 BPM. (2) Each transition between products is marked by the speaker's quick delivery of the item name and price, creating a rhythmic, information-dense flow. The BGM remains consistent and lively. (3) The vocal intensity remains high throughout the entire clip as the speaker lists dozens of products without significant pauses, maintaining an authoritative and helpful persona for deal-seekers. (4) The track concludes with the final item mentioned and the energetic BGM fading out slightly at the very last second.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick, efficient, and energetic summary of weekly discounts at Costco Taiwan for the period of July 7th to July 13th, encouraging viewers to visit the store and follow the channel for more updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: This is a news-style reporting of discounts rather than a direct brand endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density 'rapid fire' editing style typical of social media consumption, where visual and audio information is delivered at an extremely fast pace to maintain viewer engagement during a long list of items.
